items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of keeping credential facts discoverable while documents remain restricted, as stated in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms this requirement is satisfied or any checks related to the discoverability of credential facts. The absence of relevant evidence leads to an inconclusive status regarding the requirement's coverage.
